Translation.Text:
Do only use original female parts of the Double-T Adhesive Connector 90° produced by Bredent. For ordering or have a look which female part is compatible please refer to http://www.bredent.com The listed REF is linked to the product information.
Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.

Do only use original female parts of the LV1 Retention produced by Bredent. For ordering or have a look which female part is compatible please refer to http://www.bredent.com The listed REF is linked to the product information.
Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.

Do only use original female parts of the Vario-Kugel-Snap oc 2.2mm produced by Bredent. For ordering or have a look which female part is compatible please refer to http://www.bredent.com The listed REF is linked to the product information.
Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.

Do only use original female parts of the Vario-Kugel-Snap sg 1.7mm produced by Bredent. For ordering or have a look which female part is compatible please refer to http://www.bredent.com The listed REF is linked to the product information.
Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.

Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.

Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.

Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.

Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.

Bredent does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled parts and the female fitting which respects to each other.
